title: [test-manager] Blocker: task-0001 (issue #334)
description: Test blocker issue created to validate the blocker reporting pipeline. No code changes required.

substeps.title: Validate blocker reporting pipeline works end-to-end
substeps.notes: Issue #334 created by test-manager, dispatched to CCC worker, resolved as test validation. Pipeline confirmed working.

notes: This was a pipeline validation test, not a real blocker. The test-manager (tier t1) created this issue to verify that blockers are correctly reported, dispatched, and resolved. Third test run (first was issue #310, second was #317).
